implementationNotes:
Draft PR #22 created — awaiting Terraform plan

PR #22 published and ready for review

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote: Updated api-specs/api-sample.openapi.yaml: added /profile path with GET (operationId: getProfile) and PATCH (operationId: updateProfile) operations. GET returns UserProfile (id uuid, displayName, email, theme enum). PATCH accepts ProfileUpdate body (displayName, theme) and returns merged UserProfile. Responses: 200/401 for GET, 200/400/401 for PATCH. No new Terraform resources — APIM picks up new operations from OpenAPI spec via existing azurerm_api_management_api.sample resource. Terraform plan: 0 to add, 10 to change, 0 to destroy.

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added fn-profile.ts with GET/PATCH /api/profile endpoint using in-function X-Demo-Token auth via safeEqual(). GET returns hardcoded mock profile; PATCH validates body with ProfileUpdateSchema and returns merged profile. Integration tests added to smoke.integration.test.ts covering auth 200/401 and validation 400 paths.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: Added /profile page with authenticated form for editing displayName and theme. NavBar Profile link added to shared NavBarShell. E2E tests cover happy path, 400/401 errors, network failure, navigation persistence, and banner clearing.

items.label: Dead Code Eliminated
items.docNote: No dead code found. user-profile-3 was purely additive (fn-profile.ts, profile/page.tsx, NavBar update, tests). All exports are consumed. ApiErrorCodeSchema in packages/schemas has zero consumers but is in protected shared schemas directory. safeEqual is duplicated in fn-demo-login.ts and fn-profile.ts (both copies live — code quality note for future refactor). All tests green: backend 27/27, frontend 23/23.

errorLog.message: Elevated apply resume cycle 1/5. Reset 2 items to pending for standard CI re-verification.
